Hind Al Oud Pop-Up Store

2023
Client Hind Al Oud
Region Galleria Mall, Abu Dhabi, UAE
Year 2023
Sector Other

Immersive Pop-Up Store

Design Concept

This immersive pop-up was designed as a luxury pavilion in the heart of Galleria Mall, combining bold architecture with sensorial storytelling to create a memorable retail destination.
